runTitle: v8.12.19 production targeted QA - healthy filter closure
coveredSurfaces: Vercel production /api/version reports v8.12.19 with commit 197e762aa1e64d16beda2a1bb77a109ad5b11160 and GitLab pipeline 2548694499
Cloud Run AI Engine /health reports version 8.12.19
GitLab v8.12.19 tag pipeline 2548694499 success, including deploy, deploy_ai_engine, post_deploy_smoke, and post_deploy_ai_engine_smoke
Playwright CLI production AI direct-message recheck for normal-range server list prompt
AI Chat: normal-range server list query returns deterministic healthy-only server list with concrete server IDs and criteria
skippedSurfaces: Lowest-load and Advisor prompts: already passed in QA-20260524-0574 and were not rerun to avoid extra live LLM calls.
Standard five-question conversational QA: skipped because this was a single blocker closure recheck.
Vision real-image QA: skipped per manual-only policy.
Broad route/dashboard/modal packs: skipped because this run validated one AI routing blocker only.

aiLatencyObservations.source: Playwright CLI UI metadata badge and response body

expertAssessments.rationale: The remaining healthy-filter blocker was retested on production v8.12.19 and returned deterministic healthy-only evidence instead of the previous generic summary.
GitLab pipeline 2548694499 succeeded, Vercel version metadata matched v8.12.19, Cloud Run health was ok, and Vercel usage remained normal.
The recheck used a stricter Playwright CLI assertion requiring the exact normal-range server-list shape and rejecting the previous generic health summary.

usageChecks.summary: npm run check:usage:vercel PASS. Current billing period effective 15.3081 USD, billed 0.0000 USD; no unexpected billed usage observed.

artifacts.label: v8.12.19 healthy filter closure evidence
artifacts.note: Single-prompt pass evidence and deploy/version observations.

completedImprovements.title: Healthy-only server filter should resolve to deterministic inverse filter evidence
completedImprovements.evidence: Production v8.12.19 recheck asked '현재 정상 범위인 서버 목록 보여줘' and received '정상 범위 서버 목록' with criteria and 17 concrete server IDs.

notes: This run closes the pending healthy-filter blocker opened by QA-20260524-0574 and reproduced by QA-20260524-0575.

The response still reports tool metadata as monitoring-server-health because the healthy-only path is implemented inside server-health deterministic evidence, but the response body now carries the required normal-range criteria and server list.
